test.query: SELECT count() FROM test.hits WHERE NOT ignore(match(URL, '^https?://(?:www\\.)?([^/]+)/.*$'))
SELECT count() FROM test.hits WHERE NOT ignore(match(URL, '^https?://[^/]+/'))
SELECT count() FROM test.hits WHERE NOT ignore(match(URL, '^https?://[^/]+/[^?]*\\?'))
SELECT count() FROM test.hits WHERE NOT ignore(extract(URL, '^https?://([^/]+)'))
SELECT count() FROM test.hits WHERE NOT ignore(extract(URL, '^https?://(?:www\\.)?([^/]+)/'))
SELECT count() FROM test.hits WHERE NOT ignore(extract(URL, '[?&]([^=]+)='))
SELECT count() FROM test.hits WHERE match(URL, '^https?://(?:www\\.)?([^/]+)/.*$') SETTINGS max_threads = 1
SELECT count() FROM test.hits WHERE NOT ignore(extract(Referer, '^https?://([^/]+)')) SETTINGS max_threads = 1
